rotateKeyDescription: This will generate a new team encryption key and re-encrypt all team passwords and entries with it.
rotateKeyWarning1: All team entries will be re-encrypted. This may take a while for large teams.
rotateKeyWarning2: Members who are not online will receive the new key automatically when they next connect.
rotateKeyWarning3: This action cannot be undone. Ensure all members are active before rotating.
rotateKeyFailed: Key rotation failed. Please try again.
rotateKeyFetchFailed: Failed to load team data for rotation.
rotateKeyRateLimited: Too many rotation attempts. Please wait and try again.
rotateKeyVersionConflict: Key version conflict. Another rotation may be in progress.
rotateKeyEntryMismatch: Entry count mismatch. Please refresh and try again.
rotateKeyVaultRequired: Your vault must be unlocked to rotate the team key.
rotateKeyNoMembers: No active members with encryption keys found.
